refsynopsisdiv.title: Syntax
refsynopsisdiv.synopsis: out = impadarray(image, padSize) out = impadarray(image, padSize, method) out = impadarray(image, padSize, "constant", padValue)

listitem.para: Scalar padding for every side, [vertical horizontal] symmetric padding, or asymmetric [top bottom left right] padding.
Scalar border value used by constant padding. The default is zero.
Padded image with the same datatype and channel count as image.

refsection.title: Description
refsection.para: Adds a fixed-value border or extends the nearest edge pixels. Constant and replicate padding preserve the input datatype.

refsection.title: Examples
refsection.para: Example 1: Add different amounts of padding to each image edge
Example 2: Compare constant and replicated edge padding

tr.td: Function introduced with constant and replicate padding.
